headline: Co-founder at Pebbly Beach AI working on practical AI adoption for SMBs
title: Co-founder
confidenceNote: LinkedIn profile and Pebbly Beach AI company pages align on name, role, company, and Sunshine Coast location.
bioMarkdown: Adam is co-founder of Pebbly Beach AI, an Australia-based AI services and platform company focused on helping small and mid-sized businesses adopt AI in practical workflows. He is a useful match for founders and operators thinking about AI strategy, governance, workflow automation, analytics, and team adoption.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Adam Townsend as Co-founder at Pebbly Beach AI in Sunshine Coast, Queensland.

primary.label: Pebbly Beach AI LinkedIn
primary.note: Company page lists Adam Townsend among employees and describes AI strategy, governance, workflow automation, analytics, and training specialties.

primary.label: Pebbly Beach AI Hugging Face
primary.note: Organization profile links to pebblybeach.ai and lists Adam Townsend among team members.

secondary.label: Adam Townsend Medium archive
secondary.note: Older article by Adam Townsend; useful background on professional-services thinking.

headline: Partner and Managing Director at Accso South Africa
title: Partner and Managing Director
confidenceNote: Accso's own Cape Town page names Adam Wayland as Partner and Managing Director; LinkedIn and video references corroborate the South Africa leadership role.
bioMarkdown: Adam is Partner and Managing Director for Accso South Africa, with a focus on HR and business development for Accso's Cape Town presence. He is a good match for conversations on international software delivery, South African engineering teams, and AI-native software services.

headline: Engineering leader; attendee-provided role is Engineering Manager at Google
title: Engineering Manager
confidenceNote: Public evidence supports Aderlei Coraini as an engineering leader in Santander/F1RST contexts, but does not independently verify the current Google Engineering Manager role.
bioMarkdown: Aderlei is an engineering leader in Sao Paulo. Public sources show prior visibility in Santander/F1RST technology, banking-as-a-service, APIs, and digital transformation contexts; attendee-provided data says he is now an Engineering Manager at Google. Best matched with engineering leadership, platform/API, and financial-technology conversations.

headline: Co-founder of AgentMail, building email infrastructure for AI agents
title: Co-founder
confidenceNote: YC, LinkedIn, X, and AgentMail sources consistently identify Adi Singh as a co-founder/founder of AgentMail.
bioMarkdown: Adi is co-founder of AgentMail, a YC S25 company building email inbox APIs for AI agents. He is relevant for conversations about agent infrastructure, autonomous workflows, developer tools, email identity, and how agents communicate with existing business systems.

primary.label: AgentMail
primary.note: Describes AgentMail as an email inbox API for AI agents.
